scripts.build:wasm: cd ../.. && wasm-pack build . --release --target web --out-dir npm/kriging-rs-wasm/pkg -- --features wasm && rm -f npm/kriging-rs-wasm/pkg/.gitignore
scripts.build:wasm:gpu: cd ../.. && wasm-pack build . --release --target web --out-dir npm/kriging-rs-wasm/pkg -- --features wasm,gpu && rm -f npm/kriging-rs-wasm/pkg/.gitignore
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck:contracts && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm test
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && (test -f pkg/kriging_rs.js && test -f pkg/kriging_rs_bg.wasm || (echo 'error: pkg/ missing or incomplete; publish would omit WASM files' >&2 && exit 1))
